summary: Built Vrijen LinkedIn Retrospective - January 2026. Full data visualization dashboard integrated into vrijenattawar.com/projects/linkedin. 14 visualization sections covering career arc, network growth, messaging patterns, content activity, search behavior, learning journey, job applications, and correlations. Privacy layer with pseudonymized names and categorized companies. Added Projects page with data-driven config, Konami code easter egg, GitHub link, and cryptic hint on main page. Build orchestrated across 4 waves with 8 workers.
key_decisions: Build orchestrated via 4 waves with 8 workers
